alpaca-core.description: Shared primitives for the alpaca-rust workspace

alpaca-rest-http.description: Shared HTTP transport layer for the alpaca-rust workspace

alpaca-data.description: Rust client for the Alpaca Market Data HTTP API

alpaca-trade.description: Rust client for the Alpaca Trading HTTP API

alpaca-mock.description: Executable mock server for alpaca-rust trading and market-data flows

alpaca-time.description: New York time and US trading-calendar semantics for the alpaca-rust workspace

alpaca-option.description: Provider-neutral option semantics and math for the alpaca-rust workspace

alpaca-facade.description: High-level convenience facades built on top of the alpaca-rust workspace crates
